    <p>{`EU Digital Services Act (DSA) Trader Requirements`}</p>
    <p>{`If you want your listing to be available in the EU region, you'll need to provide the `}<strong parentName="p">{`Trader information`}</strong>{` as well. See the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer.adobe.com/compliance/"
      }}>{`EU Digital Services Act Trader Requirements`}</a>{` for more information.`}</p>
    <p>{`If you do not wish to provide such information, your listing will be automatically hidden to users in Europe—who won't be able to purchase your plugin—while the rest of the world will still have access to it.`}</p>
    <p>{`In the `}<strong parentName="p">{`Commerce`}</strong>{` tab of the Publisher Profile page, you'll be asked to register with Adobe's third-party payment provider, `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://fastspring.com/"
      }}>{`FastSpring`}</a>{`, and enter your `}<strong parentName="p">{`FastSpring key`}</strong>{`. This will allow the Creative Cloud Marketplace to pay for your plugin's sales and transfer the royalties to your FastSpring account.`}</p>

    <p>{`Fill in the required fields (Supported languages, Version details, Screenshots...) in all the tabs.     <p>{`When you're done, click on `}<strong parentName="p">{`Submit for review`}</strong>{`. You'll be presented with a summary of the information you've provided. Add a note for the reviewers, including any testing credentials if they need them, and preview the listing details in the Creative Cloud Marketplace to make sure everything looks good.`}</p>
    <p>{`You have the option to have your plugin automatically published after the review process is complete, or manually publish it later.`}</p>
